sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n81451" key="perika/qisis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περικάθ-ισις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n81451.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">siege</tr_>, ib.</sense> </entryFree>
